_doc: NPC dialog trees for Kindra town. Each key is an NPC id. A dialog is an array of nodes; each node is either a string (text line) or an object {text, choices: [{label, next}], set_flag, check_flag}.

elder_moss.name: Elder Moss
intro: The fire in your bones draws you to the Pyre, young one.
Take this drake. Its kind has chosen you.
Walk with it. Return when you have tested its spirit on the Dustway.
post_starter: The Dustway stretches east. Watch the grass — wild drakes hide there.
When you have faced Warden Brask at the Scald, come back and the north gate will open.

rival_sable.name: Sable
first_meeting: So the old man gave you one too.
Don't think that makes us friends. I'll beat you to the Scald.

sign_east.text: DUSTWAY ROUTE 1 →  Keep to the path. Tall grass stirs.

sign_north.text: THE SCALD — Warden Brask's domain.  Closed until proven.
